properties.property: INSERT INTO td_compliance_policy ( policy_id, policy_name, policy_type, regulation, rules, status, created_time, created_by, updated_time, updated_by ) VALUES ( #[policyId], #[policyName], #[policyType], #[regulation], #[rules], #[status], #[createdTime], #[createdBy], #[updatedTime], #[updatedBy] )

UPDATE td_compliance_policy SET policy_name = #[policyName], policy_type = #[policyType], regulation = #[regulation], rules = #[rules], status = #[status], updated_time = #[updatedTime], updated_by = #[updatedBy] WHERE policy_id = #[policyId]

SELECT * FROM td_compliance_policy WHERE 1 = 1 #if($policyType && $policyType != '') AND policy_type = #[policyType] #end #if($regulation && $regulation != '') AND regulation = #[regulation] #end #if($status && $status != '') AND status = #[status] #end ORDER BY created_time DESC
